group.description: Report concepts for visualizing OSGi bundle dependencies.

concept.description: Returns bundle dependency adjacency pairs (source, target) with dependency types and versions.
concept.cypher: MATCH (source:Osgi:Bundle)-[d:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT source.bundleSymbolicName AS Source, source.bundleVersion AS SourceVersion, target.bundleSymbolicName AS Target, target.bundleVersion AS TargetVersion, d.viaRequireBundle AS ViaRequireBundle, d.viaPackageWiring AS ViaPackageWiring ORDER BY Source, Target

concept.description: Returns Require-Bundle adjacency pairs (source, required) with version ranges. Includes both resolved and unresolved entries.
concept.cypher: MATCH (source:Osgi:Bundle)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(rb:Osgi:RequiredBundle) OPTIONAL MATCH (rb)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(target:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT source.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, source.bundleVersion AS BundleVersion, rb.symbolicName AS RequiredBundle, rb.versionRange AS VersionRange, rb.optional AS Optional, target.bundleSymbolicName IS NOT NULL AS Resolved ORDER BY Bundle, RequiredBundle
